findings.description: Per-file opens bypass the path-admission boundary (AC #61 gap): only top-level dir args route through _validate_admitted_path (2871-2874, 2938); files discovered under them (manifest JSONs via iterdir(), metadata.json, transcript.jsonl, stop-attempts.jsonl — sites 1093-1096, 1267, 1299, 1330, 1409, 1787) are read with plain read_text/read_bytes which follow symlinks with no containment check. A symlink planted inside .devflow/tmp/workflow-manifests/ or a bundle dir is silently followed and an arbitrary out-of-root file is read/parsed. Fix: containment-check each discovered file's resolved path (or reject is_symlink() entries) before reading. Severity bounded by local-only 0600-output threat model but it is the AC's own named class.

performance.event_count is unconditionally None (2980) while diff-added docs/workflow-flight-recorder.md (~361) states 'Performance reporting includes ... event count' — presented as a delivered metric; the analyzer parses every event so the value is knowable. Graded documented_falsehood by this agent. Fix: tally events during extraction, or disclose always-null in the doc sentence — both sides same commit.

AC #63 compatibility-fixture rows missing in test file: no Unicode/spaced-path fixture, no compaction fixture, no interleaved concurrent-lifecycles-in-one-transcript fixture (closest: two separate sessions :945), no shallow-clone/no-remote row. Worktree/detached-HEAD partially discharged at the manifest layer in test_workflow_flight_recorder.py.

join_confidence exact arm latent contract bug: two launches sharing a source_event_id join exact, but _source_event_id is event-scoped (596-598) and one assistant event can carry multiple Bash tool_uses — two different commands from one message would join exact, bypassing the secret-affected carve-out. Unreachable in Wave 1 (documented 2013-2018) but it is the pinned reference. Add tool_use_id equality to the exact arm.

Taxonomy over-count direction undisclosed: for any head not in NON_VERIFICATION_HEADS, a verification-pattern hit anywhere in the segment classifies the whole segment verification ('man pytest' becomes a verification request); Wave-1 gap disclosure (1474-1482) covers only the under-count direction.
Two mutation tests assert only the negative (assertNotEqual REL_CANDIDATE_TRANSPORT_RETRY) without pinning the resulting class (456-460, 718-728), unlike five siblings.
metrics.caller_observed_duration_ms is an unbounded raw per-launch list under a singular-named key; per-launch value already on each launch record. Emit aggregate or bounded list.

run.sh registry pins formatting-sensitive (grep -cF literal breaks under re-serialization); test uses abbreviated argparse prefixes --manifests/--bundles (2261) fragile to future flag ambiguity; fixed-name fixtures vb-snap-test.json/vb-snap-reasons.json under shared .devflow/tmp can collide across parallel invocations.

assessment: Ready to merge: With fixes. No Critical.
notes: Branch behind origin/main by 1 commit (merge-base aa279263) — handled by Checkpoint 3, not a PR defect
Reviewer did not execute the suite (read-only constraint); orchestrator's own in-env run is the test evidence
